title: heptapleurum kinabaluense
intro: Heptapleurum kinabaluense, also known as the Borneo Pleurorrhiza or Sabah Pleurorrhiza, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Borneo. It belongs to the family Araliaceae and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and preventing the growth of certain microorganisms. Heptapleurum kinabaluense can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is often used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
